verbatim_quote:
Now I might feel like hitting you or anybody else or kicking the cat or whatever in which case I instead of giving you any one of those actions I just use a term like angry.
but really that's shorthand for all those angry actions.
gloss: [ANALOGY] Now I might feel like hitting you or anybody else or kicking the cat or whatever in which case I instead of giving you any one of those actions I just use a term like angry. but...
